body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Recital 2 e (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission



(2e)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

(2e) This Regulation should not affect the provisions aiming to improve working conditions in platform work set out in Directive … [COD 2021/414/EC].

This Regulation should not affect the provisions aiming to improve working conditions in platform work set out in Directive … [COD 2021/414/EC].
